channel.title: Admission Exercise on Hello, Conmajia
channel.description: Recent content in Admission Exercise on Hello, Conmajia

item.title: Oxford Admissions Exercise: MScMCF 2020
item.description: Notes 提示 The questions are based on linear algebra, calculus, probability, partial differe ntial equations, and algorithms. 习题涉及内容有线性代数、微积分、概率论、偏微分方程及算法。 You should attempt all questions and show all working. 你应尝试完成所有习题，并记录全部解题过程。 Stating the answers without showing how they were obtained will not attract credit. 直接写出答案而未记录解答过程将无法得分。 Total points: 100 满分：100 Probability 概率 .post-content ol.exercise li ol li { list-style-type: lower-alpha; } .post-content ol.exercise li ol li ol li { list-style-type: lower-roman; } .
